session.user: Run `ruff format --diff src/erk/core/codespace_run.py` and report the exact diff output.
session.assistant: I'll run the ruff format command to check the diff for the codespace_run.py file.
session.tool_result:
Exit code 1 1 file would be reformatted
--- src/erk/core/codespace_run.py +++ src/erk/core/codespace_run.py @@ -26,8 +26,6 @@ Returns: A shell string suitable for passing to codespace SSH """ - cd_prefix = ( - f"cd {shlex.quote(working_directory)} && " if working_directory is not None else "" - ) + cd_prefix = f"cd {shlex.quote(working_directory)} && " if working_directory is not None else "" bootstrap = "git pull && uv sync && source .venv/bin/activate" return f"bash -l -c '{cd_prefix}{bootstrap} && {erk_command}'"
session.assistant:
Here's the exact diff output:
```diff --- src/erk/core/codespace_run.py +++ src/erk/core/codespace_run.py @@ -26,8 +26,6 @@ Returns: A shell string suitable for passing to codespace SSH """ - cd_prefix = ( - f"cd {shlex.quote(working_directory)} && " if working_directory is not None else "" - ) + cd_prefix = f"cd {shlex.quote(working_directory)} && " if working_directory is not None else "" bootstrap = "git pull && uv sync && source .venv/bin/activate" return f"bash -l -c '{cd_prefix}{bootstrap} && {erk_command}'" ```
The formatting change removes the parentheses line break and condenses the `cd_prefix` assignment onto a single line.
